headline: Blue Owl Atlas Stake Raises Questions On Valuation And Earnings Mix
summary: Blue Owl Capital and Blackstone have acquired a minority stake in Atlas Holdings, a private equity firm focused on complex industrial turnarounds. This transaction highlights Blue Owl’s role as a provider of capital solutions to established private equity managers alongside large peers such as Blackstone. headline: Shares of private credit companies are trading lower after reports that Morgan Stanley limited redemptions at one of its private credit funds. The move follows a similar earlier restriction by BlackRock on a $26 billion private credit fund, raising concerns about industry health and potential contagion risk.
